datasets.source: NYC TLC yellow taxi trip records and taxi zone lookup
datasets.source_identity: January 2024 yellow_tripdata parquet plus NYC TLC taxi zone lookup CSV and taxi zones ZIP
datasets.hash_material: canonical JSON mapping source filenames to SHA-256 file hashes
datasets.notes: Public monthly Parquet release with fixed January 2024 yellow taxi input and fixed zone assets for the maintained NYC taxi regression artifact.
